title: Local SEO Page Creator – Countrywide UPVC
summary: Skill for generating local SEO landing pages for Countrywide UPVC. Covers the complete body-only HTML template structure designed for embedding in WordPress Breakdance Page Builder, including: structured data (FAQPage, LocalBusiness, Service schemas), CSS design system, hero section, trust bar, intro/SEO content, service cards, security section, internal linking, areas served, gallery, testimonials, FAQ accordion, and CTA placement. Includes rules for image-relevance, location-specific content, and the exact design tokens and class naming convention used across all pages.
